name: Kumquat Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone, cut in half, and skin the chicken breasts.
- Note: It will take about 20 kumquats to make 1 1/2 cups.
2. Combine cheese and 1/2 tsp tarragon; set aside.
3. Flatten chicken to 1/4 inch thickness. Spread cheese mixture evenly on each piece of chicken. Roll up, tuck in sides, and pick.
4. Combine egg and 2 tbsp water in a small bowl; stir.
- Dip each roll in the egg white mix.
5. Dredge each roll in the bread crumb mix (breadcrumbs and wheat germ).
6. Place in a 12x8x2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
- Set aside; keep warm.
7. Combine juice, sugar, and garlic in a small saucepan; boil.
- Cook until reduced to 1 cup.
8. Combine 2 tbsp water and cornstarch; stir. Add to the juice mix, stirring.
- Add vinegar, liqueur, and 1/4 tsp tarragon, simmering for 5 minutes or until kumquats are tender.
9. Remove garlic and serve with sauce.
- Garnish with additional kumquats.
